intro: Save the reef in a magical underwater interactive storybook!
description:
When the vital Glow keeping the Coral Spire Village alive begins to fade, Lumeera, a young seahorse-fairy who can feel the reef's energy, must leave home for the first time to save it. Accompanied by a cheerful reefpup, a scholarly octopus, and a clumsy jellyfish-fairy, she journeys toward a deep indigo trench where an ancient glowwhale awaits to test their true understanding of the light.

• An interactive picture book for ages 4–8.
• 10 chapters. Approximately 12,000 words of story.
• Short sessions. Perfect for one chapter per evening. Read together or alone.
• Original illustrations using cute 3D style.
• Original music and sounds.
• Themes: courage, friendship, listening, caring for a fragile place.
• No ads · No in-app purchases · No frightening content · No sad ending.
